channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Gas pipeline blast disrupts supply in Quetta and surrounding Balochistan districts
item.description: QUETTA: On Monday night, gas supply to Quetta and several districts of Balochistan was suspended after unknown armed men blew up a major gas pipeline at the Western Bypass area. According to officials...

item.title: 17-year-old admits to stealing nearly £140,000 of cosmetics in London
item.description: A 17-year-old boy has admitted to shoplifting almost £140,000 worth of products from Boots and Holland & Barrett stores across London over a period of two years. The Highbury Corner Youth Court heard ...

item.title: Harambee Stars Defeat Grenada 3-0 in FIFA Series Third-Place Match
item.description: Harambee Stars showcased a strong performance against Grenada in the third-place play-off of the FIFA Series at Amahoro Stadium in Kigali on March 30, winning 3-0. Ryan Ogam once again found the net, ...

item.title: Officials and locals give conflicting reports after Msasa mine shafts collapse in Bukombe
item.description: A serious incident occurred on Sunday, March 29, 2026, at Msasa mine in Runzewe Ward, Bukombe District, Geita Region, after several mining shafts collapsed. Residents and local traders reported that m...

item.title: NLP Gains Momentum in Ukambani, Challenges Wiper's Dominance
item.description: The National Liberation Party (NLP) is making serious inroads into the Ukambani region, traditionally a stronghold of the Wiper Party. They're doing this through a series of grassroots town hall meeti...

item.title: Stellenbosch prepare for possible departure of defender Thabo Moloisane
item.description: Stellenbosch FC (Stellies) are facing uncertainty over the future of defender Thabo Moloisane, whose contract with the club expires at the end of the season. Despite offering the player what CEO Rob B...

item.title: Malacañang declares shortened work hours for government offices on Holy Wednesday
item.description: Malacañang Palace has officially announced that all government offices will observe a half-day work schedule on Holy Wednesday. This adjustment allows government employees to prepare for the upcoming ...

item.title: Rappler Debunks Viral Lies on Middle East Crisis and Its Effects on Filipinos
item.description: The Rappler Newsbreak video “Fact Check wRap: Lies about the Middle East crisis,” presented by Shay Du, focuses on the surge of misinformation spreading online about the current conflict in the Middle...

item.title: BJP releases Assam Assembly election manifesto; promises jobs, flood management, and UCC
item.description: The Assembly elections for Assam, Kerala, Puducherry, Tamil Nadu, and West Bengal are drawing near, with polling dates set for April 9 and April 23, 2026, depending on the state. On March 30, nominati...

item.title: Canadian Scholar Files Bail Petition in Lahore Cybercrime Case
item.description: LAHORE: Hamza Ahmad Khan, a Canadian national and Pakistani PhD scholar, has approached the Lahore High Court (LHC) seeking post-arrest bail in a cybercrime case filed under the Prevention of Electron...

item.title: Authorities warn Canadians of phishing scams posing as bread price-fixing settlement payout notices
item.description: The Canadian Anti-Fraud Centre (CAFC) has issued a warning about a wave of phishing scams targeting Canadians eligible for compensation from the national bread price-fixing settlement. Since March 1, ...

item.title: Trump signals readiness to end Iran conflict despite Strait of Hormuz closure as Gulf tensions escalate
item.description: The Hindu’s live coverage from March 31, 2026, reports heightened tensions in the ongoing U.S.–Israel–Iran conflict, with several new attacks and diplomatic manoeuvres unfolding across West Asia. Acco...

item.title: Trump talks about Iran oil amid US troop deployment in Middle East
item.description: Tori don dey hot for Middle East as US President Donald Trump talk say dem fit take control of Kharg Island wey dey important for Iran oil export. As Trump yan this one, US don send about 3,500 Marine...

item.title: Trump warns of military action against Iran amid stalled peace talks
item.description: Former US President Donald Trump has issued a stark warning to Iran, threatening to destroy the country's power stations, oil wells, and potentially desalination plants if a ceasefire is not agreed up...

item.title: Alberta seeks constitutional amendment to increase provincial input on judicial appointments
item.description: Alberta's government, led by Premier Danielle Smith, is calling on the federal government to amend the Constitution to give provinces greater influence over the appointment of judges at the provincial...

item.title: Kenya Petitioners Support Temporary Halt of NTSA Instant Fines System, Court Case Ongoing
item.description: In Nairobi, petitioners challenging NTSA's proposed Instant Fines Management System have welcomed the authority's decision to suspend the rollout, describing it as consistent with the concerns they ra...

item.title: Kuwaiti Oil Tanker Attacked Amid Rising Tensions Between US and Iran
item.description: A Kuwaiti crude oil tanker, the Al Salmi, was struck by a drone near Dubai port, resulting in a fire that was later extinguished, with all 24 crew members reported safe. Kuwaiti authorities have attri...

item.title: Veteran Politician and Former Kilwa South MP Seleman 'Bwege' Bungara Dies
item.description: Today, Monday, March 30, 2026, Tanzania lost a respected political figure, Seleman Bungara, widely known as Bwege. According to his son, Hassan Seleman Bungara, Bwege passed away while receiving medic...

item.title: South Africa Protests Nigerian 'King' Installation, Sparking Sovereignty Concerns
item.description: Tensions have escalated in South Africa following a controversial event involving the alleged installation of a Nigerian 'king' in the Eastern Cape province. The event, which gained traction on social...

item.title: Pakistan’s Auto Industry Expands Amid Global and Regional Challenges
item.description: KARACHI: Despite ongoing instability in the Middle East since February 28, Pakistan’s auto sector is showing resilience and moving forward with strategic expansions. Atlas Honda Ltd (AHL), a joint ven...
